headline: The (not so) stupid questions to ask during a heatwave in France
description: Can we swim in the Seine? Should I eat meat when it is 40 degrees? Can I ask for a glass of water in any café? Le Monde answers your questions.

Ten years after Brexit, Britons want closer ties to the EU
description: According to a survey by the European Council on Foreign Relations, British voters, disappointed by the 'negative impact' of leaving the EU, stand ready to accept the restoration of freedom of movement between the UK and Europe.

headline: Marc Bloch to be inducted into the Panthéon under his descendants' watchful eyes
description: On Tuesday, Emmanuel Macron will preside over his sixth and potentially his final Panthéon induction ceremony, honoring historian Marc Bloch. The Bloch family has set conditions, notably asking that 'the man's uniqueness' be respected.

headline: Alan Greenspan, former Fed chair and champion of market self-regulation, dies 100
description: The American economist, who led the US central bank for nearly two decades, died Monday, June 22, at the age of 100.

headline: 250 years of American independence: How the text that founded the US – and changed the world – was drafted
description: 'America 250' (1/13). The 13 colonies had been fighting the British Crown for a year when, in July 1776, lawyer Thomas Jefferson completed the drafting of the Declaration of Independence. Adopted by Congress on July 4 in Philadelphia, this document, which established the principle of equality for all – even though slavery was still legal everywhere – founded the United States of America.

headline: 'Twisted Face,' the French Gestapo collaborator who arrested historian and resistance fighter Marc Bloch
description: France André, known as 'Twisted Face,' was a staunch French collaborator who led a gang of nearly 100 people in the Lyon area. They spread terror through thefts, arrests, torture and murders, all committed for personal gain and to serve the Nazis. Among his many victims was Marc Bloch, a Jewish historian and resistance fighter who will be inducted into the Panthéon on June 23.

headline: What is included in France's comprehensive law against gender-based and sexual violence?
description: Following the death of 11-year-old Lyhanna in early June, momentum is growing for a comprehensive law to protect women and children, combining prevention and prosecution measures.
